# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure Key Vault
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the Key Vault
  tenantId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD Tenant ID
  appServicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the primary application service principal
  backendServicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the backend service principal
  cicdServicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the CI/CD pipeline service principal
  adminGroupObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the admin security group for Key Vault management
  enableSoftDelete:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable soft delete for Key Vault
  softDeleteRetentionInDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 90
    minValue: 7
    maxValue: 90
    metadata:
      description: Number of days to retain soft-deleted vaults
  enablePurgeProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable purge protection to prevent permanent deletion during retention period
  enableRbacAuthorization:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Use vault access policies (false) or Azure RBAC (true)
  networkAclDefaultAction:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Deny
    allowedValues:
      - Allow
      - Deny
    metadata:
      description: Default action for network ACL - Deny for least privilege
  allowedSubnetResourceIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: List of subnet resource IDs allowed to access the Key Vault
  allowedIpRanges:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: List of allowed IP address ranges in CIDR notation

variables:
  # Least privilege access policies - each principal gets only what it needs
  # Read-only secrets access for application service principals
  secretsReadOnlyPermissions:
    - get
    - list
  # Admin permissions scoped to secrets management only
  secretsAdminPermissions:
    - get
    - list
    - set
    - delete
    - recover
    - backup
    - restore
  # CI/CD needs to set secrets but not delete them in normal operation
  secretsDeployPermissions:
    - get
    - list
    - set
  # No principal gets key or certificate permissions unless explicitly needed
  emptyPermissions: []
  # Build virtual network rules from allowed subnets
  virtualNetworkRules: "[if(empty(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')), createArray(), parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]"

resources:
  # Key Vault with hardened configuration
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: development
      managedBy: arm-template
      securityReview: required-before-production
    properties:
      tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      # Soft delete and purge protection prevent accidental or malicious data loss
      enableSoftDelete: "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]"
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]"
      enablePurgeProtection: "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]"
      # Disable ARM template deployment access to vault - secrets should be
      # managed through dedicated pipelines, not embedded in templates
      enabledForDeployment: false
      enabledForDiskEncryption: false
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: false
      # Network ACLs - deny by default, allow only specific networks
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: "[parameters('networkAclDefaultAction')]"
        bypass: AzureServices
        copy:
          - name: virtualNetworkRules
            count: "[length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]"
            input:
              id: "[parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')[copyIndex('virtualNetworkRules')]]"
              ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint: false
          - name: ipRules
            count: "[length(parameters('allowedIpRanges'))]"
            input:
              value: "[parameters('allowedIpRanges')[copyIndex('ipRules')]]"
      # Explicit, least-privilege access policies per principal
      # Each service principal receives only the minimum permissions required
      accessPolicies:
        # Primary application: read-only access to secrets
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('appServicePrincipalObjectId')]"
          permissions:
            secrets: "[variables('secretsReadOnlyPermissions')]"
            keys: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
            certificates: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
        # Backend service: read-only access to secrets
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('backendServicePrincipalObjectId')]"
          permissions:
            secrets: "[variables('secretsReadOnlyPermissions')]"
            keys: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
            certificates: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
        # CI/CD pipeline: can read and set secrets (for rotation) but not delete
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('cicdServicePrincipalObjectId')]"
          permissions:
            secrets: "[variables('secretsDeployPermissions')]"
            keys: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
            certificates: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
        # Admin group: full secrets management for operational needs
        # Scoped to secrets only - no key or certificate permissions
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('adminGroupObjectId')]"
          permissions:
            secrets: "[variables('secretsAdminPermissions')]"
            keys: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"
            certificates: "[variables('emptyPermissions')]"

  # Diagnostic settings for audit logging - critical for security monitoring
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: "2021-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/auditLogs')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      logs:
        - category: AuditEvent
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 365
      metrics:
        - category: AllMetrics
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90

  # Resource lock to prevent accidental deletion of the Key Vault
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/locks
    apiVersion: "2020-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '-lock')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      level: CanNotDelete
      notes: Prevents accidental deletion of the Key Vault containing application secrets

outputs:
  keyVaultId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
